summary: Human Activity Risk AI + Forecast Simulation Lab (Phase 28) - All 32 backend tests PASSED. Frontend fully functional with Activity Risk page showing zone activity risk analysis, fleet device activity risk, point assessment, and Simulation Lab Forecast Scenarios tab with 4 scenario types and comparison results.

human_activity_risk_assess: test_assess_response_structure - PASS: lat, lng, risk_score, risk_level, factors, signals, incident_counts, assessed_at
test_assess_signals_structure - PASS: crowd_density, temporal_spike, hazard_zone, emergency_cluster, traffic_corridor, acceleration, hour_activity_level
human_activity_fleet: test_fleet_response_structure - PASS: total_devices, high_risk_count, assessments, assessed_at
test_fleet_assessments_structure - PASS: device_id, device_name, senior_name, risk_score, risk_level, factors, signals
human_activity_hotspots: test_hotspots_response_structure - PASS: total_zones, high_activity_count, crowd_zones_count, hazard_zones_count, hotspots, analyzed_at
test_hotspots_zone_structure - PASS: zone_id, zone_name, zone_risk_score, activity_risk_score, activity_risk_level, activity_factors, activity_signals, incident_counts, lat, lng, combined_risk
forecast_scenarios: test_scenarios_has_four_types - PASS: incident_surge, patrol_deployment, new_hazard, time_shift
run_forecast_scenario: test_patrol_deployment_scenario - PASS: improved 7 zones, resolved P1: 4
test_incident_surge_scenario - PASS: worsened zones, new P1
test_comparison_structure - PASS: baseline vs scenario with delta values

point_assessment.result: Shows risk level badge (critical) + score (9.6) + toast notification

zone_activity_tab.content: Zone Activity Risk Analysis - 18 zones with risk score circles (zone + activity = combined), zone names with incident counts, risk level badges, activity signal tags (crowd, hazard, traffic, spike, emergency)

fleet_activity_tab.content: Fleet Device Activity Risk - 9 devices, 3 high risk badge, each device shows risk score, device ID, senior name, risk level, lat/lng, activity factors

scenario_builder.title: Build Forecast Scenario
scenario_builder.parameters_section: Incident Reduction slider, Target Zones selector

scenario_results.summary: Shows Worsened, Improved, Category Changes, Priority Changes, New P1, Resolved P1
scenario_results.comparison_table: Zone, Now, Base 48h, Sim 48h, Delta, Category, Priority columns

GET /api/operator/human-activity-risk/as.response_fields: lat, lng, risk_score, risk_level, factors, signals (crowd_density, traffic_corridor, temporal_spike, hazard_zone, emergency_cluster, acceleration, hour_activity_level), incident_counts (within_500m, within_1km), assessed_at

GET /api/operator/human-activity-risk/fl.response_fields: total_devices, high_risk_count, assessments (array with device_id, device_name, senior_name, risk_score, risk_level, factors, signals), assessed_at

GET /api/operator/human-activity-risk/ho.response_fields: total_zones, high_activity_count, crowd_zones_count, hazard_zones_count, hotspots (array with zone_id, zone_name, zone_risk_score, activity_risk_score, activity_risk_level, activity_factors, activity_signals, incident_counts, lat, lng, combined_risk), analyzed_at

GET /api/operator/simulate/forecast-scen.returns: 4 scenario types: incident_surge, patrol_deployment, new_hazard, time_shift

POST /api/operator/simulate/forecast-sce.response_fields: scenario_name, scenario_type, scenario_details, total_zones, summary (zones_worsened, zones_improved, category_changes, priority_changes, new_p1_zones, resolved_p1_zones), comparisons (baseline vs scenario forecasts with delta values)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 18 learned hotspot zones, 9 fleet devices, 80+ geolocated incidents
context_for_next_testing_agent: Human Activity Risk AI (Phase 28) fully tested. 3 new API endpoints: /human-activity-risk/assess (point assessment), /human-activity-risk/fleet (device activity risk), /human-activity-risk/hotspots (zone activity analysis). 2 new forecast simulation endpoints: /simulate/forecast-scenarios (list 4 types), /simulate/forecast-scenario (run what-if). Frontend has Activity Risk page at /operator/activity-risk with summary cards, point assessment, Zone Activity tab, Fleet Activity tab. Simulation Lab has 5th tab 'Forecast Scenarios' with scenario builder, parameters, zone selector, and comparison results table. Response times: assess ~instant, fleet ~5s, hotspots ~10s, forecast scenario ~7s.
